This song somehow seems to resonate with people no matter what phase of 'love' they are in, and me being a silly romantic, couldn't help but try and visualise what i was feeling, when i heard Bhavya sing it. What an absolute pleasure to have such talented people all around me to randomly get up one day and make soppy reels.
